sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n37661" key="e)coxa/des" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐξοχάδες</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ων</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">αἱ</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ἔξοχος</etym>) <sense id="n37661.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">external piles, haemorrhoids</tr_> (the internal being called <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἐσοχάσες</foreign>), <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:3:59" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.59</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
